name: hhdm-apiclient-wrapper

metadata.name: hhdm-apiclient-wrapper
metadata.summary: Library that abstracts use of the HH Data Management API

documentation:
## hhdm_apiclient_wrapper

### Wrapper for use of the HH Data Management Api Client

Examples of the wrapper can be found at https://github.com/hh-development/python-api-wrapper-examples

See documentation for the API at https://hhdm-api.hh-dev.com/swagger/index.html

modules.name: hhdm_apiclient_wrapper.models
documentation: from os.path import dirname, basename, isfile, join
import glob
modules = glob.glob(join(dirname(__file__), "*.py"))
__all__ = [ f'.{basename(f)[:-3]}' for f in modules if isfile(f) and not f.endswith('__init__.py')]
print(__all__)
import os
for module in os.listdir(os.path.dirname(__file__)):
if module == '__init__.py' or module[-3:] != '.py':
continue
__import__(module[:-3], locals(), globals())
del module

documentation: import oauth_authentication_manager

documentation: region Manual Endpoints

methods.name: hhdm_apiclient_wrapper.base_api_client.ApiClient.get_request
documentation: endregion
region Network Functions

methods.name: hhdm_apiclient_wrapper.base_api_client.ApiClient.upload_file
documentation:
Uploads a file without compressing it.

```
param uri

URL to upload to.

param file

path of the file to upload on the local filesystem, or stream-like object to upload.

param headers

Dictionary of headers to create the request with.

return

whether the upload request succeeds or not.

rtype

bool
```

methods.name: hhdm_apiclient_wrapper.base_api_client.ApiClient.compress_and_upload_file
documentation:
Compresses an entire file or filestream before uploading it.

```
param uri

URL to upload to.

param file

path of the file to upload on the local filesystem, or bytes-like object to upload.

param headers

Dictionary of headers to create the request with.

return

whether the upload request succeeds or not.

rtype

bool
```

methods.name: hhdm_apiclient_wrapper.base_api_client.ApiClient.get_version
documentation: Returns either the version found in the parent pyproject.toml file, or the installed package
endregion
